calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-06-2017 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for Short Cause Trial/Prove Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Stephen M. Murphy, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Karen Y. Uchiyama, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff MING JING LI, sworn and examined,
No appearance by or on behalf of Defendant MATTHEW D. JOHNSON,
Court ordered Defendants DOES 1-X dismissed without prejudice.

After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendant as follows:
The lease is forfeited.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 1669 Sacramento Street, Room #2, San Francisco, California 94109.

Damages $2500.00
Holdover damages $413.28
Pre-judgment interest $0.00
Attorney's Fees $0.00
Costs $290.00
For a Total Judgment of $3719.88

Judgment signed in open court.

UD COURT TRIALS
Off Calendar Mar-06-2017 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-01-2017 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Line 10
Judge Pro Tem: Anne Wong, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported. (D501/JPT)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Ming Jing Li is present.
Attorney Karen Uchiyama for the plaintiff.
Defendant Matthew D. Johnson is NOT present.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there was no appearance by defendant. The trial date of March 6, 2017 remains on calendar. (501)
